title: [FIRRTL] Parsing Problem with Instance Named "write"
body:
The following FIRRTL text fails to parse:

```scala
circuit Foo:
  module Bar:
    input a: Clock
  module Foo:
    input a: Clock

    inst write of Bar
    write.a <= a
```

```bash
firtool Foo.fir
# Foo.fir:8:5: error: bundle value 'write' should only be used from subfield
#     write.a <= a
#     ^
```

However, changing the name of the instance to "bar" causes it to parse:

```scala
circuit Foo:
  module Bar:
    input a: Clock
  module Foo:
    input a: Clock

    inst bar of Bar
    bar.a <= a
```
